name: schedule-manager
description: Create, query, update, and delete user schedule tasks stored in the local SQLite reminder system.
when_to_use: Use this skill when the user asks to create a reminder, schedule, calendar item, todo with a reminder time, or a dated task.
Use this skill when the user wants to view, modify, postpone, complete, cancel, or delete an existing schedule task.
Use these tools instead of pretending to remember schedules from prior turns.
